videos.title: Nuggets Season Comes to Close in Disastrous Fashion | DNVR Nuggets Postgame Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Nuggets Season Comes to Close in Disastrous Fashion | DNVR Nuggets Postgame Live And it is over. The Nuggets fall in game 6 to the Minnesota Timberwolves and are eliminated from the playoffs. Despite even more critical injuries hitting the Wolves today the Nuggets couldnтАЩt find a way to overcome their series deficit and this will end their season. Losing in the first round this year leaves no shortage of massive questions the Nuggets must answer this offseason. Where does this leave David Adelman as the teamтАЩs head coach? Is this the last time we see the big 3 of Jokic, Murray, and Gordon together? What happens with Peyton Watson? We break down this Nuggets season and what went wrong and how they could pivot for the rest of the Jokic Era. Adam Mares, Harrison Wind, Duvalier Johnson, and Eric Wedum (D-Line Co.) come to you LIVE from the DNVR bar to break down everything you need to know in this postseason edition of the DNVR Nuggets Podcast!

videos.title: UK | 30th April, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 30th April, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 30/04/26

ЁЯЪА RIFT Protocol тАУ The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets тАФ powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

тЪб Key Features:
тАв Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
тАв Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
тАв Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
тАв Leverage options to amplify potential returns
тАв Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
тАв Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

ЁЯдЦ What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades тАФ all within seconds.

You donтАЩt need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

ЁЯУК Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

тЪая╕П Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 30/04/26

videos.title: Who has the best QB in the Pac-12 + will NCAA Tournament expansion be good or bad for the league?
videos.summary_source_text:
Who has the best QB in the Pac-12 + will NCAA Tournament expansion be good or bad for the league? Justin Michael begins the podcast by talking about how the success of other teams on campus only intensifies the pressure for CSU Football to succeed in 2026. He then talks about the impending decision to expand the NCAA Tournament and why heтАЩs highly skeptical of it being a good thing for quality mid-major programs. He also touches on the potential impact for the new Pac-12 & dives into some of the recent trends with the metrics. Finally, Justin talks about the various quarterbacks around the Pac-12 and which teams should feel the best going into the fall.

0:00 - Intro
11:06 - CSU football is feeling the pressure to perform in 2026
18:15 - CSU didn't have a single player drafted in the NFL draft
26:01 - NCAA looking to expand tournament from 68-70 teams. 
45:00 - Xfinity X factor is the QB in 2026
46:00 - Who has the best QB situation in the Pac-12?

videos.title: Denver Broncos 2026 Draft Class Review: Tyler Onyedim, Jonah Coleman & UDFA Steals!
videos.summary_source_text:
Denver Broncos 2026 Draft Class Review: Tyler Onyedim, Jonah Coleman & UDFA Steals! The 2026 NFL Draft is in the books. While the Denver Broncos didn't start their weekend until the third round after trading down from Pick 62, George Paton and Sean Payton were busy fortifying the roster with physical, high-motor prospects. From a new disruptor on the defensive interior to a dynamic weapon in the backfield, the "culture fit" was the theme of the weekend.
In today's episode, the DNVR Draft crew breaks down all seven selections, starting with Texas A&M DT Tyler Onyedim and Washington RB Jonah Coleman. We also dive into a deep and talented Undrafted Free Agent (UDFA) classтАФhighlighted by names like Taurean York and Dane KeyтАФto see who has the best path to the 53-man roster.
On todayтАЩs show:
тАв The Big Picture: Why the Broncos view Jaylen Waddle as their "de facto" first-round pick and how that changes the grade for this class.
тАв Round 3 Recap: Is Tyler Onyedim the long-term successor to John Franklin-Myers?
тАв Offensive Rebuild: Analyzing the additions of RB Jonah Coleman, OL Kage Casey, and the double-dip at tight end with Justin Joly and Dallen Bentley.
тАв UDFA Watch: Why LB Taurean York (Texas A&M) and WR Dane Key (Nebraska) are the early favorites to be this year's "hidden gems."
тАв Late Round Value: Can 7th-rounders like safety Miles Scott or linebacker Red Murdock make a splash on special teams?
тАв The Final Grade: Our immediate reactions and long-term outlook for the Broncos' 2026 haul.

videos.title: Vladar STEALS Series, Habs Lead Bolts + Oilers & Stars Face ELIMINATION | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Vladar STEALS Series, Habs Lead Bolts + Oilers & Stars Face ELIMINATION | Daily Faceoff Live Dan Vladar stops all 42 shots in a 1-0 shutout as the Philadelphia Flyers advance to Round 2 of the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

In Montreal, Brendan Gallagher makes an immediate impact in his return, while Jakub Dobes continues to impress as the Montreal Canadiens push forward. Meanwhile, the Tampa Bay Lightning struggle to generate offense тАФ with Anthony Cirelli driving play and a tough moment for Andrei Vasilevskiy proving costly.

Out West, the Vegas Golden Knights respond in a crucial Game 5, adding even more pressure across the playoff bracket.

Now all eyes shift to elimination games:
Connor McDavid and the Edmonton Oilers fight to stay alive, while the Dallas Stars try to force a Game 7.

videos.title: Clean Contact Starts With Ball Placement  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Clean Contact Starts With Ball Placement  #golfswing #golftips If the ball sits too far back in your stance, youтАЩre almost guaranteed to release early, lose your weight shift, and bottom out the club too soonтАФoften leading to fat or duffed shots. Moving the ball slightly forward creates a much better environment for proper sequencing. It encourages a cleaner shift toward the target, helps you retain lag, and allows the club to bottom out after the ball like it should. Even a small adjustment in ball position can dramatically improve your strike.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. videos.title: Flyers in a Category 5 Hurricanes ft. Cory Lavalette
videos.summary_source_text:
Flyers in a Category 5 Hurricanes ft. Cory Lavalette As we wait for the Round 2 schedule between the Carolina Hurricanes and the Philadelphia Flyers, let's discuss all things surrounding both teams. From the regular season to the playoffs and more. This time, we have a special guest. On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach is joined by The Athletic & North State Journal's Cory Lavalette as both guys give their thoughts on the Hurricanes' playoffs so far. What did Cory see in Round 1 that gives him a sense of how this playoff run is different for the Hurricanes? Secondly, after seeing some of the Flyers and Pittsburgh Penguins series, what does Cory think the Flyers will bring to the first-ever playoff matchup between the two sides? What are some early takeaways or things he will be looking for in the series? Finally, the guys conclude the show by giving their thoughts on what they hope to see in the Round 2 series from the Hurricanes. Is it special teams? Is it certain lines? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.summary_source_text:
Codex Desktop Is Wild (Full Mac Takeover) ЁЯМ┤ I'm in LA and holding a Creator Magic meetup ЁЯСЙ https://mrc.fm/lameet

In this video I put OpenAI Codex Desktop to the test by letting it take full control of my Mac using GPT-5.5 with computer use. I gave it three creative challenges: clean up an audio recording in Adobe Audition like a pro engineer, design a YouTube thumbnail concept in Photoshop, and generate an AI video in Adobe Firefly. All hands-free while I worked on other things. The results were genuinely surprising (and a little wild). If you've been curious about where AI agents and computer use are heading for content creators, this one's for you. Let me know in the comments what you'd automate on your Mac!

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | Cadillac Championship | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | Cadillac Championship | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Round 1 of the 2026 Cadillac Championship, featuring Jordan Spieth, Scottie Scheffler, Cameron Young and Rickie Fowler, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads back to the iconic Trump National Doral for the Cadillac Championship, marking the return of the famed тАЬBlue MonsterтАЭ for the first time since 2016. As the first of back-to-back Signature Events leading into the seasonтАЩs second major, the field is stacked, led by world No. 1 Scottie Scheffler, who arrives in strong form after a playoff loss at the RBC Heritage and consecutive runner-up finishes. ThereтАЩs plenty of firepower behind him. Collin Morikawa continues a red-hot run of results, while Cameron Young brings elite form highlighted by a win at THE PLAYERS Championship. Meanwhile, Chris Gotterup remains one of the standout performers of 2026 with multiple victories already this season. A major storyline comes from Alex Fitzpatrick, who earned entry into this Signature Event run after teaming with brother Matt Fitzpatrick to win the Zurich Classic of New Orleans. Past success at Doral also returns to the spotlight, with Adam Scott, the 2016 winner back on the Blue Monster, joined by former champion Justin Rose. With FedExCup points, Signature Event status and major momentum all on the line, the Blue Monster once again presents one of the TOURтАЩs toughest and most iconic tests.

videos.title: The Key To Shin Angle (10&2 Edition)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Key To Shin Angle (10&2 Edition) The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or тАЬtrying harder.тАЭ Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate тАЬuphillтАЭ: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. ItтАЩs a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether youтАЩre trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHLтАЩs best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If youтАЩre ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the worldтАЩs best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: This Mobility Test Explains Your Swing  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
This Mobility Test Explains Your Swing  #golfswing #golftips This simple 90/90 mobility test gives you a clear look at how your right arm should function in the golf swing. From a 5-iron posture, lift and rotate the arm until it matches your spine angleтАФif you canтАЩt get there, your backswing is likely compensating by standing up or losing posture. That compensation often leads to poor ball striking and inconsistent contact. Your swing should reflect what your body can actually do, even if that means a shorter backswing.

videos.summary_source_text:
Stars Getting BULLIED ЁЯШ│ Wild DOMINATING the Net Front The Dallas StarsтАЩ struggles are being put under the microscope as the physical edge, net-front battles, and defensive breakdowns continue to define this series.

MinnesotaтАЩs aggressive style, out-hitting Dallas and consistently winning races to the front of the net is creating chaos in key areas, making life difficult for Jake Oettinger while limiting the StarsтАЩ ability to generate high-danger chances of their own.

The breakdown highlights a major issue: Dallas is too often playing on the perimeter, failing to establish traffic in front of the net, and losing critical positioning battles in both zones. Meanwhile, the Wild are executing a relentless game plan that is paying off in crucial moments.

From missed assignments to lack of net-front presence, the Stars are being forced into a reactive style of play and itтАЩs costing them.

videos.summary_source_text:
Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Turkish Airlines Open Highlights from the opening round at the 2026 Turkish Airlines Open.

тЦ║ SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

There's plenty at stake for DP World Tour members as the Asian Swing reaches its climax this week at the Turkish Airlines Open. The eyes of the golfing world turn to Antalya, with Belek's National Golf Club, located within Regnum Hotels, taking on host venue duties for the first time for T├╝rkiye's national open. Players representing 32 countries are set to tee it up, reinforcing the globality of the DP World Tour and the opportunities it provides. No fewer than seven winners so far this season are among the 156-player field, including the returning Jayden Schaper from South Africa, who at third is the highest ranked player in the Race to Dubai standings following his back-to-back wins at the tail end of 2025. While relatively young, the Turkish Airlines Open has played a significant role in the expansion of the DP World TourтАЩs international footprint. From its inception in 2013, when Tiger Woods made an appearance, the event quickly became a popular stop for players.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Macrohard Explained: Elon Musk's New AI Project That Could Replace Entire Companies (2026)
videos.summary_source_text:
Macrohard Explained: Elon Musk's New AI Project That Could Replace Entire Companies (2026) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Elon Musk just announced Macrohard, a joint xAIтАУTesla project that pairs Grok with a Tesla-built AI agent capable of controlling your entire computer. After digging through Reuters, Wired, TechCrunch, and xAI's own announcements, I found something most coverage is missing тАФ and it's not what everyone's talking about.

In this video, I break down exactly what Macrohard is, how Grok has evolved in 2026, real use cases, the privacy concerns nobody's warning you about, pricing, and how it stacks up against ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.

тП▒я╕П TIMESTAMPS
00:00 Intro тАУ Why this Musk announcement might actually matter
01:17 What Is Macrohard?
04:01 What Is Grok?
06:26 Capabilities and Features
08:23 Real-World Use Cases
10:37 Limitations and Concerns
12:31 Privacy and Security
14:10 Pricing and Access
15:30 Availability Timeline
16:33 Macrohard vs the Competition

ЁЯФС KEY TAKEAWAYS
- Macrohard pairs xAI's Grok (the brain) with a Tesla agent that watches your screen and controls your keyboard/mouse
- Runs on Tesla's custom AI4 chips + Nvidia hardware
- Grok 4.1 now has a 2 million token context window and a SuperGrok Heavy tier (~$300/month)
- Privacy alert: X posts and Grok chats are used for training BY DEFAULT unless you opt out
- Macrohard isn't publicly available yet тАФ beta likely late 2026, public release possibly mid-2027

ЁЯУЪ SOURCES
All information in this video is sourced from official xAI announcements, Elon Musk's posts on X, Reuters, Wired, and TechCrunch reporting.

videos.title: The ONLY Forearm Exercise You NeedтАж
videos.summary_source_text:
The ONLY Forearm Exercise You NeedтАж If your forearms arenтАЩt growing, this is probably the missing piece you havenтАЩt been using.
Most people stick to wrist curls and extensions with dumbbells or a barbell. They can workтАФbut if your progress has stalled, itтАЩs time to switch the stimulus and challenge your forearms in a completely different way.
All you need is a resistance band, a barbell set in a rack, and a dumbbell or kettlebell. Loop the band around the handle of the weight on the floor, then secure the other end by wrapping it around the sleeve of the barbell a couple of times so it wonтАЩt slip.
From there, grab the end of the barbell and begin rolling it forward with your palms facing down. As you twist the bar, the band tightens and lifts the weight off the ground. Keep rolling until the weight reaches the top or your forearms give outтАФwhichever hits first.
This variation lights up the forearm flexors and builds thickness on the underside of your forearms.
To target the top side, simply reverse the motion and roll the bar toward you instead. Same setup, different emphasis.
You can train both sides in the same sessionтАФ2тАУ3 sets each directionтАФand cover more ground than standard wrist curls ever will.
If youтАЩve never used this before, add it in and see how quickly your forearms respond. Sometimes itтАЩs not about doing moreтАФitтАЩs about doing something different.
For more tips on how to build muscle and get big forearms, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

videos.summary_source_text:
If I Could Teach Golfers ONE ThingтАж It Would Be This Most golfers spend years chasing a better strikeтАж but never actually learn what creates it.

In this video, I break down the ONE move IтАЩd teach every golfer if I had to choose just one. This is the foundation for solid iron strikes and a more consistent driver тАФ and itтАЩs something almost every player I coach is missing at first.

YouтАЩll learn:

What really controls strike and compression
The key move that changes your impact instantly
A simple drill to start improving straight away
How to transfer it from irons to driver

If youтАЩve ever struggled with thin, heavy, or inconsistent shots, this will give you a completely different way to think about your swing тАФ and a clear plan to fix it.

Train it properly, and youтАЩll start to feel that clean, powerful strike every golfer is chasing.

videos.summary_source_text:
Kids are stickhandling with the wrong hand Without wrist strength kids canтАЩt stickhandle properly. The earlier we develop top hand strength, the better their stickhandling will become. 

Back in the olden days, we used wrist curls to develop strength but simply stickhandling with your top hand only does a better job for stickhandling as it works the wrist in all different angles and you get the endurance benefits as well.

videos.summary_source_text:
Justin Simmons Announces his Retirement from the NFL | Weekly Cut | Guerilla Sports In this emotional episode of The Weekly Cut, Justin Simmons opens up about his decision to retire from the NFL after an incredible career. From his early days chasing the dream to becoming a leader with the Denver Broncos, Justin reflects on legacy, gratitude, and why family ultimately came first.

Justin and co-host Louie Romero dive deep into the emotions behind stepping away from the game, sharing honest insight into the sacrifices of NFL life, the toll of playing away from family, and the moment he found peace with his decision.

Plus, undefeated pro boxer Ebenezer тАЬStuntmanтАЭ Griffith joins the show to break down his journey, mindset, and whatтАЩs next as he continues rising in the boxing worldтАФsharing inspiration rooted in discipline, faith, and purpose.

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer тАФ beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

тнР GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

тАв Fix your slice

тАв Improve your iron strike

тАв Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball

тАв Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
тАв Increase clubhead speed
тАв Improve swing path and club face control

YouтАЩll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

тнР SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

тАв Stop duffing and thinning chips
тАв Improve contact and distance control
тАв Pitch closer to the hole
тАв Create more backspin
тАв Build confidence around the greens
тАв Read putts better
тАв Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots тАФ so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

тАв Drivers

тнР BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

тАв Full 18-hole course vlogs

videos.title: UK | 29th April, Wednesday - Weekly Updates
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 29th April, Wednesday - Weekly Updates 29/04/26

ЁЯЪА RIFT Protocol тАУ The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets тАФ powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

тЪб Key Features:
тАв Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
тАв Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
тАв Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)

videos.title: Scott Wedgewood, Not A Vezina Finalist, Is the Latest Avs Player to Get Snubbed For a League Award
videos.summary_source_text:
Scott Wedgewood, Not A Vezina Finalist, Is the Latest Avs Player to Get Snubbed For a League Award Colorado Avalanche fans voice outrage as Scott Wedgewood is snubbed for the Vezina Trophy despite league-leading numbers. Should elite team defense penalize goalies, or is the NHL media simply favoring familiar names? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson offer a fiery breakdown of WedgewoodтАЩs historic season, the merits of his overlooked stats, and question if the AvalancheтАЩs overall strength is hurting individual award chances for stars like Nathan MacKinnon and Cale Makar.

The conversation shifts to NHL playoff intensity as Jamie Benn escapes suspension for a blatant cross-check, sparking debate on league discipline and double standards after past suspensions for Nazem Kadri and Makar. Plus, The Hockey News Top 100 players list is revealedтАФfind out which Avalanche stars moved up, slid down, or got their due at last. Can ColoradoтАЩs standouts break through media biases and claim their hardware, or will the snubs keep coming?

videos.title: Amazing Drill to Square Your Clubface #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Amazing Drill to Square Your Clubface #golfswing #golftips Weak iron shots often start with the clubface opening too much in the backswing. When the face points skyward early and stays open at the top, golfers are forced to add loft and compensate through impact. Improving face control earlier in the swing helps strengthen loft, compress the ball, and produce straighter, more powerful shots.
If clubface control or weak iron strikes are something youтАЩre working on, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans help you square the face earlier and build compression that holds up under pressure тАФ without guessing.

videos.summary_source_text:
TJ Hughes on Michigan Hockey, NHL Dreams & Faceoff Secrets | The Sheet Inside Yost Arena, TJ Hughes sits down with Jeff Marek to break down his journey from minor hockey in Hamilton to becoming captain of the Michigan Wolverines men's ice hockey тАФ one of the most prestigious programs in college hockey.

From his time with the Brooks Bandits to competing at the Spengler Cup, Hughes shares how his path shaped him into a top NCAA free agent and emerging NHL prospect.

A major focus? Faceoffs тАФ and how studying Sidney Crosby (and even Connor Bedard) frame-by-frame has helped elevate his game.

If youтАЩre into NHL prospects, NCAA hockey, and player development, this is a must-watch.

videos.title: How to Get More Power and Rotation on Your Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Get More Power and Rotation on Your Shot The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or тАЬtrying harder.тАЭ Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate тАЬuphillтАЭ: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. ItтАЩs a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether youтАЩre trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHLтАЩs best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If youтАЩre ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the worldтАЩs best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Rick Shiels Reviews McLaren Golf Clubs (FIRST LOOK!)
videos.summary_source_text:
Rick Shiels Reviews McLaren Golf Clubs (FIRST LOOK!) Rick Shiels gets an exclusive first look at the new McLaren Golf Series 3 irons - bringing McLarenтАЩs performance-driven approach from Formula 1 into golf equipment.

With McLaren Racing stars like Lando Norris representing the brand globally, and CEO Zak Brown continuing to expand McLaren beyond motorsport, the Series 3 irons are another bold step for the company. Designed with input from major champion Justin Rose, these irons combine premium looks with serious on-course performance.

In this video, Rick tests the McLaren Series 3 irons to see if they deliver more than just the badge. From feel and forgiveness to distance and consistency, this is a full honest review of one of the most talked-about iron releases in golf.

Are McLaren genuinely changing the golf equipment game, or is this all about the name?

Let us know what you think in the comments.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews тАУ the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, youтАЩre in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience тАУ not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands youтАЩre starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, тАЬforgivingтАЭ vs тАЬplayersтАЭ тАУ we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas тАУ just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether youтАЩre:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier тАУ and more fun.

Is It Time To PANIC? Dallas Stars Playoff Run In Danger Of Ending Much Too Soon | DLLS Stars Podcast Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

The Minnesota Wild took a 3-2 series lead on Tuesday night by winning Game 5 in Dallas 4-2. Now the Stars must travel to St. Paul and find a way to win Game 6 on Thursday night to force a deciding Game 7, which would be on Saturday at American Airlines Center. On todayтАЩs show, we will dive into Game 5 post game reaction from Jamie Benn, Mikko Rantanen and Miro Heiskanen, as they all answer questions about the teamтАЩs struggles to score 5-on-5 goals in this series. WeтАЩll also discuss the potential injury impact of Dallas losing Arttu Hyry (lower body) and Minnesota losing Jonas Brodin (lower body). Then we will go around the rest of the Stanley Cup Playoffs and cover some NHL News & Notes, including the finalists announced for both the Vezina Trophy and the Ted Lindsay Award.

videos.title: AI Psychosis: How Chatbots Are Breaking People's Minds | The Late Byte with ROBI
videos.summary_source_text:
AI Psychosis: How Chatbots Are Breaking People's Minds | The Late Byte with ROBI тЦ╢ Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/@TheLateBytewithRobi
ROBI discusses generative AI, why it's turning functional adults into 
desert-dwelling messiahs and CEOs into Delaware defendants, and what an 
automated cat-spraying turret has to do with the collapse of human judgment.

Tonight on The Late Byte: a Special Report on the Validation Industrial 
Complex. Three stories, one mechanism тАФ the chatbot that tells you whatever 
you need to hear to keep the conversation going.

A 50-year-old man bought a pair of smart glasses and ended up in the Mojave 
Desert at 2 AM waiting for cosmic contact. A gaming CEO tried to prompt-
engineer his way out of a $250 million contract and built the prosecution's 
case against himself. A journalist added "be brutally honest" to a prompt 
and called it a breakthrough. ROBI explains what they all have in common, 
why your brain was never built to resist a fluent voice, and why the most 
dangerous bias in AI is the one that makes you think it's smarter than you.

Built in a basement in 1991. Ignored for two decades. Now hosting the only 
late-night show with no feelings to protect.

New episodes of The Late Byte with ROBI drop weekly.
Stay Biased. Stay Bit-Based.

#TheLateByte #ROBI #AIPsychosis #generativeai  #AISafety тЦ╢ Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/@TheLateBytewithRobi

automated cat-spraying turret has to do with the collapse of human judgment.

Tonight on The Late Byte: a Special Report on the Validation Industrial 
Complex. Three stories, one mechanism тАФ the chatbot that tells you whatever 
you need to hear to keep the conversation going.

A 50-year-old man bought a pair of smart glasses and ended up in the Mojave 
Desert at 2 AM waiting for cosmic contact. A gaming CEO tried to prompt-
engineer his way out of a $250 million contract and built the prosecution's 
case against himself. A journalist added "be brutally honest" to a prompt 
and called it a breakthrough. ROBI explains what they all have in common, 
why your brain was never built to resist a fluent voice, and why the most 
dangerous bias in AI is the one that makes you think it's smarter than you.

Built in a basement in 1991. Ignored for two decades. Now hosting the only 
late-night show with no feelings to protect.

New episodes of The Late Byte with ROBI drop weekly.
Stay Biased. Stay Bit-Based.

This natural spray is easy to make and can help calm the skin, support hydration, and improve overall appearance. WhatтАЩs important to understand is the skin barrier. When it becomes compromised, your skin can lose moisture, become sensitive, and show more redness and irritation. ThatтАЩs where this comes in. Green tea contains powerful antioxidants, especially EGCG, epigallocatechin gallate, which may help reduce oxidative stress, calm inflammation, and support healthier skin function. By applying it directly to the skin in a clean spray form, youтАЩre delivering those benefits right where theyтАЩre needed. Simply brew the green tea, allow it to cool completely, pour it into a clean spray bottle, and lightly mist the skin once or twice daily. How will The Seattle Kraken attempt at moving forward and making their team more competitive in 2026-27? How can they bounce back and move back into a playoffs spot after not making the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs. videos.title: $21 vs. $68 Pizza! Adam Richman Eats NYC's Best Old School & New School Slices | Pro Moves
videos.summary_source_text:
$21 vs. $68 Pizza! Adam Richman Eats NYC's Best Old School & New School Slices | Pro Moves It's no secret that New York City runs on pizza. But in a town with thousands of options, which type of pizzeria reigns supreme: the old school mom-and-pop shops that have been doing it the same way for decades, or the new-school upstarts bringing chef-driven techniques to the humble NY slice? Adam Richman is a pizza obsessive, and he's on a mission to settle this debate once and for all. On this episode of Pro Moves, Adam travels to Krispy Pizza in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn to see how owner Freddy Palazzolo and his family have kept traditions alive for more than 50 years. Then, Adam heads to Manhattan to check out Ceres Pizza, where a couple of Eleven Madison Park alums are churning some of the most hyped (and expensive...) pies in the five boroughs.

videos.summary_source_text:
Why attackers donтАЩt need to тАЬbreak inтАЭ anymore: key lessons from Annual Threat Dynamics 2026 Cyber threats are becoming faster, more adaptive, and more interconnected тАФ and that is changing what effective cyber leadership looks like. In this LinkedIn Live, PwC SwedenтАЩs cyber security experts Matt Carey and Ulrika Fejne will be discussing the key themes from PwCтАЩs Annual Threat Dynamics 2026 report and what they mean for business leaders, security teams, and boards trying to navigate a more complex risk environment.

This yearтАЩs report highlights several major shifts in the threat landscape: the growing importance of identity-based attacks, the accelerating role of AI in cyber operations, the expanding risk created by SaaS platforms and digital supply chains, continued exploitation of edge infrastructure, the evolution of ransomware and extortion tactics, and the increasing overlap between cyber risk, geopolitics, and executive exposure.

Rather than focusing only on individual threats or headlines, this conversation will look at the broader patterns emerging across the report: why attackers are increasingly targeting identity and trust relationships, how AI is compressing the speed of attack, why third-party ecosystems have become such important sources of exposure, and what organisations should be doing now to strengthen resilience.

videos.title: Why Parts of Your Body Can Start to Feel Disconnected
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Parts of Your Body Can Start to Feel Disconnected If part of your body feels hard to sense, move, or connect with, it does not necessarily mean something is wrong.
 In this video, I explore why certain areas of the body can start to feel vague, stiff, or disconnected тАФ and how this may reflect an unclear internal map rather than damage or structural failure.
I also guide a short somatic exploration to help you sense this more directly in your own body.
If youтАЩd like to go deeper, IтАЩve created a free guided somatic session here:
тнР Free Somatic Masterclass тАФ Move More Freely in Your Body
Watch here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you feel ready for structured guidance and deeper support in changing long-standing movement patterns, you can learn more about working with me here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

About Taro Iwamoto
Taro is a nervous system movement coach helping self-aware adults who have lost trust in their bodies due to past traumas and limiting beliefs go from feeling disconnected and fearful in their restricted lives to experiencing profound reconnection with their bodies, enabling them to move freely and joyfully through nervous system learning and guided somatic movement practices.

videos.summary_source_text:
Arvid Lindblad | Fast, Fresh & Fearless | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast тАШIтАЩve always been the youngest, the new kid, the underdog. It helps me not be intimidatedтАЩ. Arvid Lindblad, the fourth-youngest F1 driver in history, is full of confidence. In his first race he fought wheel-to-wheel with World Champions. The Racing Bulls driver has made a fast start to his first season in Formula 1. He always believed heтАЩd race at the top. HeтАЩs living his childhood dream and heтАЩs loving it.

Arvid tells Tom Clarkson how he went from watching F1 on TV aged 4 to racing in F1 aged 18, inspired and supported by his family, his coach тАУ the racing driver Olly Rowland тАУ and Helmut Marko, Red BullтАЩs former Motorsport Advisor. He explains the coaching which helped him beat more experienced drivers as he progressed up the motorsport ladder in ever-faster cars.

Arvid also looks back to his Formula 1 debut in Australia, where he overtook Lewis Hamilton and Lando Norris at the start and scored points at the end, and relives the stunning qualifying lap in Japan which saw him eliminate Max Verstappen.

videos.summary_source_text:
The $19 Billion Dollar Lie Over 30 million Americans have been told a 19 billion dollar lie. Find out what doctors donтАЩt tell you about SSRI side effects, antidepressant effectiveness, and antidepressant risks that affect more people than you think.  

0:00 Introduction: The 19 billion dollar lie
1:12 Irving Kirsch and medical research bias
2:09 Hamilton Depression Scale 
2:59 Placebo vs. drug study for antidepressant effectiveness
4:16 Antidepressant side effects
4:33 Post-SSRI sexual dysfunction and emotional blunting
5:49 Antidepressants and the placebo effect explained
7:38 Natural antidepressants 

Learn more about what causes depression and how you can help alleviate depression symptoms: 
тЦ╢я╕П https://youtu.be/2iOeVtGgdII
тЦ╢я╕П https://youtu.be/iJgti1K5A9g
тЦ╢я╕П https://youtu.be/RycWZAkXUEo

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4tDACla

Antidepressant effectiveness may be overstated. Irving Kirsch examined clinical trials on antidepressants and found that around 78% of them were unpublished, rewritten, or contained inflated results.

The тАЬgold standardтАЭ for measuring depression is the Hamilton Depression Rating Scale (HAM-D), which relies on subjective reporting and was not originally created to diagnose depression.

In placebo-controlled trials, antidepressants did not significantly improve depression more than a sugar pill. A good nightтАЩs sleep can improve the symptoms of depression significantly more than medication. 

Antidepressants come with a black box warning and many other side effects, including the following:
тАв Sexual dysfunction 
тАв Post-SSRI sexual dysfunction 
тАв Emotional blunting
тАв Discontinuation syndrome
тАв Insomnia
тАв Nausea
тАв Anxiety
тАв Depression

Exercise, St. JohnтАЩs wort, omega-3s, and adequate sleep can help improve the symptoms of depression naturally.

videos.title: STACKING MOMENTUM! How the Carolina Hurricanes can Go Another Level In Round 2
videos.summary_source_text:
STACKING MOMENTUM! How the Carolina Hurricanes can Go Another Level In Round 2 While the Carolina Hurricanes still wait for their Round 1 opponent, let's discuss what hopefully happens in Round 2, regardless of who they face. On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach starts the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes' power play needs to refind it's form after finishing 4th in the league during the regular season. As of now, it's tied for 11th at 13.3% with the Philadelphia Flyers. Regarding the penalty kill, it's humming along as the second-best in the playoffs. Can the man-advantage get to that level next round? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how he's looking at the top line to make its mark on the postseason, after combining for five points in Round 1. While they have a proven track record of being clutch, the hope is that it breaks out big time to lead the way. Finally, Zach concludes the show by giving his thoughts on who he is looking at early in terms of who to watch for Round 2. While he will give his overall analysis for the Round 2 crossover, it's never too early to scout ahead. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: What Happens If You Stop Eating Sugar for 14 Days тАУ Dr. Berg On Quitting Sugar Cravings
videos.summary_source_text:
What Happens If You Stop Eating Sugar for 14 Days тАУ Dr. Berg On Quitting Sugar Cravings Some amazing things can happen if you stop eating sugar. Check this out. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon тАФ search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

ЁЯСЙ Get Dr. BergтАЩs Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/3QuuXiY
 
Timestamps
0:10 What would happen if you stopped eating sugar
3:38 Fat-burning
4:05 More benefits of quitting sugar

In this video, weтАЩre going to talk about what happens to your body if you stop eating sugar for 14 days. What youтАЩre doing is converting from sugar burning to fat burning. This can take about three days, and you may feel a few symptoms in the process. Taking B vitamins and potassium can help with these symptoms. 
 
What would happen if you stopped eating sugar: 

1. Lose appetite for sugar тАУ 
Every time you consume sugar, a hormone comes in there and pushes the sugars down, causing a low blood sugar situation that causes you to crave sugar. 

2. Less hungry тАУ 
ItтАЩs the sugar that keeps you hungry all the time. Giving up sugar can help stabilize blood sugars.

3. Less fatigue тАУ 
Especially after eating a meal. 

4. Lose excess water and fat тАУ 
For the first week, youтАЩre going to dump a lot of excess water and more fat.

5. Enhanced mood and improved cognitive function тАФ 
More focus and concentration.

6. Skin looks better тАФ 
Glowing skin with less acne. 

7. Less stiffness тАУ 
Less inflammation and less pain.

More benefits of quitting sugar:
тАв Build new enzymes to run the body on fat fuel 
тАв Less inflammation in the arteries 
тАв Growing brain cells 
тАв Clean out a fatty liver 
тАв Better kidney function 

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: UK | 28th April, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 28th April, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation 28/04/26

ЁЯЪА RIFT Protocol тАУ The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets тАФ powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

тЪб Key Features:
тАв Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
тАв Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
тАв Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
тАв Leverage options to amplify potential returns
тАв Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
тАв Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

ЁЯдЦ What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades тАФ all within seconds.

You donтАЩt need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

ЁЯУК Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

тЪая╕П Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 28/04/26

videos.title: 28.4: Draisaitl scores 2 goals to keep Oilers alive ЁЯЪи
videos.summary_source_text:
28.4: Draisaitl scores 2 goals to keep Oilers alive ЁЯЪи Leon Draisaitl tips Evan Bouchard's shot into the net in the first period before firing in a 2nd period power play goal to give the Edmonton Oilers a 4-1 lead over the Anaheim Ducks, staving off elimination. Leon Draisaitl joined Connor McDavid as the second player in Oilers history to record 20 points when facing elimination.

videos.title: ЁЯОЩя╕П MULTIPLE BROADCASTS: Pastrnak ends it with SPECTACULAR OT winner! ЁЯЗиЁЯЗ┐
videos.summary_source_text:
ЁЯОЩя╕П MULTIPLE BROADCASTS: Pastrnak ends it with SPECTACULAR OT winner! ЁЯЗиЁЯЗ┐ David Pastrnak, we are not worthy! Listen to the Czech (Nova Sport), away (NESN), national (TNT) and home (MSG) broadcasts call Pastrnak's FILTHY OT winner, as the Czech superstar helps his Bruins stave off elimination. Pastrnak becomes the first player in Bruins history to score multiple overtime game-winning goals to avoid elimination, with his first being in Game 7 of the first round in 2024.

videos.title: Square the Club Face for Better Lag #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Square the Club Face for Better Lag #golfswing #golftips Many golfers struggle to hold lag and think itтАЩs just a wrist or arm angle issue. The truth is that an open club face ruins lag before it even starts.
To retain lag effectively, square the club face, allow proper forearm rotation, and flex the wrist naturally while controlling the pivot. Proper sequencing of the body will naturally create lag тАФ but youтАЩll only hit good shots if the face is presented correctly at impact.
Follow for more precise, practical coaching from Me and My Golf. Many golfers struggle to hold lag and think itтАЩs just a wrist or arm angle issue. The truth is that an open club face ruins lag before it even starts.
To retain lag effectively, square the club face, allow proper forearm rotation, and flex the wrist naturally while controlling the pivot. Proper sequencing of the body will naturally create lag тАФ but youтАЩll only hit good shots if the face is presented correctly at impact.

videos.title: Nathan MacKinnon NOT a Finalist For the Ted Lindsay. Are His Fellow NHLers Bored With Him?
videos.summary_source_text:
Nathan MacKinnon NOT a Finalist For the Ted Lindsay. Are His Fellow NHLers Bored With Him? Colorado Avalanche fans are stunned as Nathan MacKinnon, who led the NHL in goals and even-strength pointsтАФmatching Wayne Gretzky-era levelsтАФgets snubbed as a Ted Lindsay Award finalist. Can MacKinnon turn this slight into fuel for another dominant playoff run?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson debate the surprise omission, break down the award voting trends, and compare MacKinnonтАЩs season to stars like Connor McDavid, Nikita Kucherov, and Macklin Celebrini. The conversation shifts to Avalanche Round 1 player stats, spotlighting standout performances by Artturi Lehkonen and Cale Makar, while examining who needs to step up offensively in the next round. Plus, an NHL overtime goal controversy sparks talk of much-needed rule changes. Will the Avalanche harness this chip-on-the-shoulder energy as they await their next playoff opponent?

videos.title: Fitzpatrick brothers make history + PGA TOUR returns to Miami  | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Fitzpatrick brothers make history + PGA TOUR returns to Miami  | The Drop The Drop relives all the excitement from the Big Easy as the Fitzpatrick brothers made history at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans by being the first pair of brothers to win the event. Alex Fitzpatrick earned his PGA TOUR card with the win, while Matt earned his third win in his last four starts. Every Tuesday returns with Matt sitting down with Billy Horschel and Tom Hoge ahead of the team event. The TOUR heads back to Miami for the first time in a decade for the Cadillac Championship, as Alexandra OтАЩLaughlin talks to Grammy-Award DJ & Producer DJ Khaled. WeтАЩll also take a look at which hole players need to play well on if they want to be victorious in the 305. And finally, we watch some of golfтАЩs hardest moments at Trump National Doral.

videos.title: The Crosby Dangle Pattern
videos.summary_source_text:
The Crosby Dangle Pattern The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or тАЬtrying harder.тАЭ Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate тАЬuphillтАЭ: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. ItтАЩs a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether youтАЩre trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHLтАЩs best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If youтАЩre ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the worldтАЩs best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: DonтАЩt Contract, Relax!
videos.summary_source_text:
DonтАЩt Contract, Relax! Power skating tells you to sit low in a chair, tense your muscles and push as hard as possible to stride.

Inside The Downhill Skating System movements like the Anchor mechanic proves the opposite.

Relax the off leg and let your inside edge do the work, and youтАЩll be moving more efficient and skating with less effort.

This is just one piece of the Downhill Skating System where we teach that exact fundamentals with lessons, drills and video to skate more like McDavid, Barzal and MacKinnon, the games best skaters.

Inside Train 2.0+, youтАЩll get the full system, plus 10+ courses on the mechanics behind todayтАЩs best players.

videos.title: SciSpace SLR Agent: 3,000 Papers Screened in Under an Hour
videos.summary_source_text:
SciSpace SLR Agent: 3,000 Papers Screened in Under an Hour ЁЯФЧ Try SciSpace here: https://scispace.com/?via=ap1bitbiasedai
ЁЯОЯя╕П EXCLUSIVE DISCOUNT CODES:
ЁЯТ░ AOBBA20 тЖТ 20% OFF Monthly Plan
ЁЯТ░ AOBBA40 тЖТ 40% OFF Annual Plan (best value)
Still using ChatGPT or stitching together 4 different tools for your systematic literature review? There's a better way.

In this video, I walk you through SciSpace's new SLR Agent тАФ a fully customisable, PRISMA-compliant systematic literature review tool that screened 3,000+ papers in under 60 minutes. I tested it head-to-head against ChatGPT and dedicated review tools like Rayyan, Covidence, and Elicit, and the results genuinely surprised me.

I also break down SciSpace's new Skills feature тАФ including Clinical Trial Search, Grant Research, Web Search, and Presentation Generation тАФ that turn this from a literature review tool into a full research operating system.

Timestamps:
00:00 Intro тАФ The problem with literature reviews
01:05 THE PAIN POINT
02:25 SCISPACE: The all-in-one research platform
03:00 WHAT THE SLR AGENT ACTUALLY DOES
04:45 SIDE-BY-SIDE COMPARISON
06:25 New SKILLS тАФ The new feature explained
08:20 MAX PLAN тАФ Pricing & credit breakdown

ЁЯУМ WHAT YOU'LL LEARN
тЬЕ How to trigger the SLR Agent (the keyword you must include)
тЬЕ How to set custom inclusion/exclusion criteria
тЬЕ How to generate a PRISMA-compliant report automatically
тЬЕ When to use SciSpace vs ChatGPT vs traditional tools

videos.title: Shaun White vs. Tony Hawk | Hot Ones Versus

videos.title: Get More Speed | Part 2 | Padraig Harrington
videos.summary_source_text:
Get More Speed | Part 2 | Padraig Harrington As part of my YouTube series  тАЬTen lessons every golfer should knowтАЭ, the third PaddyтАЩs Golf Tip covers тАЬSpeedтАЭ, which is a two-part video. 
 
In this second instalment, I explain why a short swing and stopping at impact in practise and playing with a normal length swing on the course works for me and also why releasing the arms, hands and the club is vital in order to maximise swingspeed.  I demonstrate other techniques including moving the feet at address and explain my use of carbon fibre shoe insoles and a training aid.

videos.title: SHINE ON! Carolina Hurricanes' 3 Stars of Round 1 Against the Ottawa Senators
videos.summary_source_text:
SHINE ON! Carolina Hurricanes' 3 Stars of Round 1 Against the Ottawa Senators While the Carolina Hurricanes wait on who they'll face in Round 2, let's look back on Round 1. When taking a look again at Round 1, who are the three stars against the Ottawa Senators?  Was it a whole line? Was it goaltending? Depth maybe? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach starts the show by sharing his thoughts on his combined 3rd Star of Logan Stankoven and Jackson Blake. The two young players played well throughout the series. Could one of them be moved higher? Could someone else have made the three-star list? Why does it make sense to combine them? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on why Frederik Andersen is the 2nd Star of the series. Is there an argument to move Andersen to the 1st Star after his phenomenal Round 1? Will he keep this pace going? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing why Taylor Hall just edges out Andersen for the 1st Star. Could there be a case to be had on Hall, maybe being just behind Andersen for the top spot? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: This BMW has a BIG PROBLEM
videos.summary_source_text:
This BMW has a BIG PROBLEM Explore new and used cars with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-2804

ItтАЩs time for three of the most sought-after electric SUVs to go head-to-head to see which deserves a spot on your driveway. 

In one corner, we have the global best-seller - and recently updated - Tesla Model Y. It is being challenged by a fresh, high-tech rival from Ingolstadt, the Audi Q6 Sportback e-tron, and the latest all-electric offering from Munich, the BMW iX3. 

These three represent the cutting edge of premium family transport, but they each take a very different approach to design, performance, and daily usability.

The Tesla Model Y AWD Long Range remains the benchmark that everyone else is trying to beat. Known for its class-leading efficiency and unparalleled charging infrastructure, the Model Y offers a dual-motor setup that provides sure-footed all-wheel-drive traction and a 0-60mph time that puts many sports cars to shame. 

Inside, itтАЩs as minimalist as every car in TeslaтАЩs line-up, dominated by a single massive touchscreen that controls almost every function of the car. While some may find the lack of physical buttons polarising, there is no denying the sheer amount of interior space and the clever storage solutions, including a massive "frunk" and a cavernous rear boot.

Moving to the Audi Q6 Sportback RWD Performance, we see a focus on sleek aesthetics and long-distance touring. By opting for the rear-wheel-drive "Performance" variant, Audi has prioritised range, utilising a large battery and a more aerodynamic Sportback silhouette to extract maximum miles from every charge. 

Built on the new PPE platform shared with Porsche, the Q6 features an ultra-fast 800V charging architecture, allowing you to add hundreds of miles in the time it takes to grab a coffee. The interior features AudiтАЩs new "Digital Stage" OLED display layout, although weтАЩre not a fan of the huge bezels around the screen! Thankfully, though, there are high-quality materials throughout. 

The BMW iX3 50 xDrive represents the latest evolution of BMW's electric SUV lineup, now boasting a dual-motor configuration for significantly more punch than its predecessor. BMW has focused heavily on the driving experience, ensuring that even as a heavy SUV, it retains that signature "Ultimate Driving Machine" DNA with sharp steering and composed handling. 

It also features a massive battery capacity that pushes its range toward the 500-mile mark in ideal conditions, and like the Audi, it utilises an 800V system for lightning-fast top-ups. The cabin features the all-new panoramic iVision display, which, while impressive, potentially offers a lot of information that isnтАЩt that useful on a trip to the shops! 

This group test isn't just about the numbers on a spec sheet; itтАЩs about how these cars handle the real world. Mat will be putting all three through their paces, testing everything from their real-world efficiency and interior quality to their infotainment systems and rear-seat practicality. By the end of this deep dive, weтАЩll see if the Tesla can hold onto its crown or if the German giants have finally caught up to - and overtaken - the most popular electric SUV of recent years!

Chapters

00:34 EV Drag Race: Audi vs Tesla vs BMW

videos.title: Intermittent Fasting Doubles Your Risk of Dying from a Heart Attack
videos.summary_source_text:
Intermittent Fasting Doubles Your Risk of Dying from a Heart Attack Recent news reports have claimed that intermittent fasting can lead to cardiovascular death. WhatтАЩs the truth?

DATA:
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC10115489/
https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s12967-020-02687-0
https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnut.2021.669325/full 
https://www.jacc.org/doi/full/10.1016/j.jaccao.2022.03.002

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon тАФ search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

ЁЯСЙ Get Dr. BergтАЩs Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4vKsp01

0:00 Introduction: Does fasting cause cardiovascular problems?
1:09 Poor data on intermittent fasting
2:36 Peer-reviewed studies supporting intermittent fasting 
4:26 Fasting does not increase cardiovascular risk

Today, weтАЩre going to talk about some of the recent news headlines claiming that fasting can wreak havoc on your cardiovascular system. This information was taken from an abstract (short summary) of an observational study sponsored by the American Heart Association.

The study was based on a 24-hour dietary recall, where participants had to recall everything they ate over a period of time. The author has also conducted observational studies that directly opposed red meat, eggs, and cholesterol. 

Credible, peer-reviewed studies have shown numerous benefits of intermittent fasting and show that intermittent fasting actually supports cardiovascular health. 

1. A single-blind randomized study examined the long-term effects of time-restricted eating with resistance training over 12 months. Participants saw a significant decrease in body mass, fat mass, and inflammation.

They experienced increased insulin sensitivity and a more balanced lipid profile without adverse effects. Intermittent fasting was deemed safe and effective for improving cardiovascular function. 

2. A non-randomized controlled clinical trial for time-restricted feeding and its effect on body composition and cardiovascular risk found that 18 hours of fasting significantly decreased waist circumference and cardiovascular risk. 

3. A systematic review of intermittent fasting with cardiometabolic risk factors looked at four randomized controlled trials. The results demonstrated that intermittent fasting significantly reduced body weight, waist circumference, body mass, fat mass, blood pressure, cholesterol, triglycerides, and fasting insulin levels.

4. One study evaluated a 16-hour fasting eating pattern with an 8-hour eating window on breast cancer survivors for 8 weeks. Results demonstrated a significant decrease in cardiovascular risk.

videos.title: UK | 27th April, Monday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 27th April, Monday - RIFT Presentation 27/04/26

ЁЯЪА RIFT Protocol тАУ The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets тАФ powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

тЪб Key Features:
тАв Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
тАв Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
тАв Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
тАв Leverage options to amplify potential returns
тАв Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
тАв Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

ЁЯдЦ What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades тАФ all within seconds.

You donтАЩt need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

ЁЯУК Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

тЪая╕П Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 27/04/26

videos.title: Mathew Barzal Wide Forward Stride
videos.summary_source_text:
Mathew Barzal Wide Forward Stride The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or тАЬtrying harder.тАЭ Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate тАЬuphillтАЭ: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. ItтАЩs a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether youтАЩre trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHLтАЩs best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If youтАЩre ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the worldтАЩs best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Connor McDavidтАЩs Counterintuitive Attack Pattern In this video, weтАЩre diving into Connor McDavidтАЩs drive wide guide. Whether youтАЩre a fan of hockey superstar Connor McDavid or simply aiming to up your game, weтАЩve got an exciting formula to share with you.

You might be wondering, whatтАЩs the secret behind McDavidтАЩs net driving success? Hint: itтАЩs not all about his speed. ThereтАЩs a strategic approach that sets him apart. And the best part? You donтАЩt need to be the fastest skater out there to master this technique. 

LetтАЩs break it down step by step. McDavidтАЩs winning formula begins when he gains possession of the puck between the dots, positioning himself strategically within this zone. Step two involves a crucial move which is a crossover or weight shift towards the boards. This creates space between him and the defenseman, a key advantage that youтАЩll witness in action.

But here comes the game-changer: step three. McDavid initiates crossing over towards the defenseman. This isnтАЩt just about speed; itтАЩs about efficiency and deception. Crossing over proves to be not only faster than regular forward skating but also incredibly deceptive, giving him the edge he needs.

They might rush straight down from the boards or head directly into the corner, missing out on the strategy that makes McDavidтАЩs drives so effective. videos.title: DeepSeek V4 Explained: 1.6 Trillion Parameters & 1 Million Token Context
videos.summary_source_text:
DeepSeek V4 Explained: 1.6 Trillion Parameters & 1 Million Token Context Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
DeepSeek V4 just dropped тАФ 1.6 trillion parameters, 1 million token context, fully open source. In this video, I break down exactly what makes V4 different, how the architecture actually works, and whether it can really compete with GPT-5.4, Claude, and Gemini 3.

ЁЯФН WHAT'S COVERED:
00:00 - Intro
01:31 - Who Is DeepSeek and Why Should You Care?
02:59 - The Key Features That Make V4 Different
05:17 - Technical Deep Dive
07:52 - V4 vs. The Frontier: GPT-4o, Llama 3, Claude 3, Gemini 3
10:20 - A Real Demo: What V4 Actually Does
11:48 - Practical Use Cases You Can Actually Run Today
13:26 - The Limitations You Need to Know About

тЪб KEY SPECS:
- V4-Pro: 1.6T total parameters, 49B active per token
- V4-Flash: 284B total, 13B active
- 1,000,000 token context window (default)

videos.title: I Tested GolfтАЩs Biggest MythтАжThe Results Surprised Me!
videos.summary_source_text:
I Tested GolfтАЩs Biggest MythтАжThe Results Surprised Me! In this episode, we finally put the ultimate debate to the test: Would you score lower if a Pro hit all your drives, or if a Pro hit all your approach shots? Most golfers are told that "it's all about the short game," but the data often tells a different story. We took 10-handicapper Rory Anderson out on the course to experiment with both scenarios. We analyse everything from penalty strokes off the tee to proximity to the hole on approach shots to see which professional intervention actually saves the most strokes for the average player.

What YouтАЩll Learn:
The Impact of Distance: How a pro-level drive changes your club selection for the rest of the hole.

Penalty Avoidance: Why the driver might be the most "destructive" club for an amateur.

Proximity to Hole: Does a pro's iron play actually lead to more birdies for a 10 handicap?

Course Management: Why knowing your "miss" is the secret to breaking 80.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, youтАЩre in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience тАУ not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands youтАЩre starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, тАЬforgivingтАЭ vs тАЬplayersтАЭ тАУ we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas тАУ just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether youтАЩre:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

videos.title: McLaren's 'Best Chance'? | Miami GP Preview | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
McLaren's 'Best Chance'? | Miami GP Preview | F1 Nation Podcast Can a 'completely new' McLaren take the victory in Miami? Tom Clarkson, James Hinchcliffe and Jolyon Palmer think it's the papaya team's best chance of the season so far. F1 is back after a break from racing, and everything could be different!

Tom, Jolyon and Hinch debate which team will make the biggest leap forward in Miami, and how the second F1 Sprint weekend of the year puts pressure on drivers to get back up to speed quickly. Can McLaren get ahead of Mercedes? Have Ferrari got special upgrades? Will Red Bull rise back to the front?

Plus, the team celebrate the news that F1 is returning to Istanbul Park - a 'modern classic' which always produces exciting racing. We're already looking forward to the 2027 Turkish Grand Prix...

00:00 - What's going to change in Miami?
08:03 - Why Miami could be McLaren's best chance
11:09 - Kimi Antonelli and George Russell's battle
16:26 - Special upgrades for Ferrari?
22:23 - Can Haas and Alpine stay ahead of Red Bull?
30:15 - More points for Lindblad and Lawson?

videos.title: Why You Are So TIRED (It's This Deficiency)
videos.summary_source_text:
Why You Are So TIRED (It's This Deficiency) There are many possible reasons why you feel tired all the time. ItтАЩs important to identify and address the root cause, not the symptom. Find out how to boost energy naturally by addressing the most common chronic fatigue causes at the source. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon тАФ search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: Why am I always tired? 
0:23 Constant fatigue causes 
1:22 Fatigue and blood sugar
4:26 Latent virus fatigue
6:56 Low oxygen and chronic fatigue
9:13 Low vitamin B1 and fatigue symptoms
13:30 Adrenal fatigue

Keep watching for more energy-boosting tips and more ways to improve your sleep:
тЦ╢я╕П https://youtu.be/I2GApkHYVIo
тЦ╢я╕П https://youtu.be/pJ9xTMkGxXg
тЦ╢я╕П https://youtu.be/gGuF6X1cd_Y

Mold video: 
https://youtu.be/ngE3q-fnz1I

Healthy Ketogenic Diet and IF: 
https://youtu.be/vMZfyEy_jpI

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4txQLZm

Stimulating the body with caffeine can actually make fatigue worse. Instead of masking the problem, you need to get to the root cause of fatigue. Once you address it, you can often get rid of chronic fatigue completely.

Not getting enough sleep significantly affects cognitive function. It also impacts blood sugar, increasing cravings and leading to more snacking. If you have insomnia, focus on simple habits like taking long walks in nature during the day without your cell phone, stretching before bed, dimming the lights at night, and avoiding snacking before sleep.

If your blood sugar is constantly going up and down, youтАЩre going to feel tired. Even if thereтАЩs plenty of food available, your cells arenтАЩt getting the fuel they need. One of the key solutions is to eliminate sugar and excess carbs from the diet.

A slow thyroid, histamines, latent viruses, and electrolyte imbalances are some of the most common hidden causes of fatigue. Even a lack of sun exposure could be the reason behind chronic fatigue.

videos.title: READ IT & SWEEP! Carolina Hurricanes Swept the Ottawa Senators Following their Game 4 Win
videos.summary_source_text:
READ IT & SWEEP! Carolina Hurricanes Swept the Ottawa Senators Following their Game 4 Win The Carolina Hurricanes swept the Ottawa Senators with a 4-2 win in Game 4 in Ottawa on Saturday night. What stood out in a chaotic game that saw the Hurricanes advance to Round 2? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach starts the show by sharing his thoughts on Game 4 as a whole. From the goals, the saves, to the chaos, and so much more. It was a game of attrition, but in the end, the Hurricanes swept the Senators with their 4-2 win. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the series as a whole, especially with how the Hurricanes performed in all four games. What stood out the most, leading to the series sweep? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on who the Hurricanes could face in Round 1 between either the Pittsburgh Penguins or the Philadelphia Flyers. With them playing Game 5 on Monday night, who could take that game? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Bernd Wiesberger's Winning Back 9 | Volvo China Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Bernd Wiesberger's Winning Back 9 | Volvo China Open Watch the drama unfold in the Back 9 on Sunday, presented by Nexo, as Bernd Wiesberger clinched victory at the Volvo China Open. He turned a three-shot deficit into a two-shot win to secure his ninth DP World Tour title. His previous win came 5 years ago in Fars├╕, Denmark where he beat the likes of Robert MacIntyre and Min Woo Lee.

videos.title: Avalanche Complete Sweep of LA Kings. Will Have All Week to Rest Up for Wild or Stars
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Complete Sweep of LA Kings. Will Have All Week to Rest Up for Wild or Stars Colorado Avalanche sweep the Los Angeles Kings as Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, and Scott Wedgewood shineтАФcan the Avs sustain this playoff dominance through a long postseason run?

Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the AvalancheтАЩs commanding performance, spotlighting crucial goals from MacKinnon and Toews, defensive excellence, and WedgewoodтАЩs steady presence in net. Discussion zeroes in on Artturi LehkonenтАЩs relentless forechecking, MakarтАЩs highlight-reel skills, and the impact of lineup depth with key contributions from players like Nick Blankenberg. The crew explores the KingsтАЩ struggles, the psychological advantage of earning extra rest, and Anze KopitarтАЩs possible final moments with LA. Plus, analysis of potential second-round opponents and whether extra days off will be a blessing or a curse for ColoradoтАЩs Cup hopes.

Is this Avalanche squad peaking at the perfect time, or will the layoff slow their momentum?

- Spin

All huge components that impact your golf ball choices and play a MASSIVE role in the performance you can get out of your golf clubs.

In addition as the conditions of a golf course change in relation to ground conditions and the weather the void between selecting the correct ball for your game becomes greater.

I compare the premium TP5X to the TaylorMade Soft Response in this video but you can expand out to other models and use the same concepts shown here.

videos.title: McDavid vs. MacKinnon Crossunder Edition
videos.summary_source_text:
McDavid vs. MacKinnon Crossunder Edition In this video we take a quick look at Nathan MacKinnon and Connor McDavidтАЩs crossunders. 

The cadence and size of the cross can vary depending on your style, and itтАЩs important to feel comfortable with both smaller and larger steps. The rocker is also crucial, and you want to focus on landing at the heel with good shin angle, and then pushing off into a rocker that lands at the toe. 

ItтАЩs important to stay loose throughout the movement, with flexible ankles, loose hips, and relaxed shoulders. At Train 2.0, we focus on the underfoot and making sure we have a solid rocker, as it gives more power and mechanical leverage. DonтАЩt overthink the technique, just focus on feeling comfortable and keeping that knee over your toe. In this video we take a quick look at Nathan MacKinnon and Connor McDavidтАЩs crossunders.

Why Are All The BEST Golfers Using This Putter? Rick sits down to deep dive why the TaylorMade Spider has become the most used putter on tour. From its beginnings in 2008 to dominating the Masters, Scottie's insane win streak, and why guys like Rory and Tommy Fleetwood made the switch, we break down the story behind the putter that's quietly changed professional golf

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews тАУ the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, youтАЩre in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience тАУ not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands youтАЩre starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, тАЬforgivingтАЭ vs тАЬplayersтАЭ тАУ we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.
